title: nectandra belizensis
intro: Nectandra belizensis, also known as Belice Nectandra or Cedro Blanco, is a plant species native to Central America, particularly in Belize and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Nectandra belizensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
